title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXXXII. Riddles.
content:
[A fire-brand with sparks on it.]

        As I was going o'er London Bridge,
            And peep'd through a nick,
        I saw four and twenty ladies
            Riding on a stick!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCXXXII. Riddles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
